name: Random Mutation
details: This means that the animal just happened to come out like that. Roll on the Wild Animal Education table.

name: Accidental Encounter
details: Some strange stuff such as radiation, energy, chemicals, biologicals, or other strangeness causes the animal to mutate. Roll on the Wild Animal Education table.

name: Deliberate Experimentation
details: An organization performed some kind of laboratory experiment on the animal to cause the mutation. First roll on the Creator Organization table, then roll again on the Deliberate Experimentation outcome table.
